section.heading: State reentry project evaluation

content.p: The Attorney General shall evaluate the demonstration projects authorized by section 10631 of this title to determine their effectiveness.

subsection.heading: Report
subsection.chapeau: Not later than April 30, 2005, the Attorney General shall submit a report to the Committees on the Judiciary of the House of Representatives and the Senate containing—

paragraph.content: the findings of the evaluation required by subsection (a); and
any recommendations the Attorney General has with regard to expanding, changing, or eliminating the demonstration projects.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 90–351, title I, § 2977, as added Pub. L. 107–273, div. B, title II, § 2421(a), Nov. 2, 2002, 116 Stat. 1802.)

note.heading: Codification
note.p: Section was formerly classified to section 3797w–1 of Title 42, The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.
